arts.sum: John Eustace has decisions to make as Blackburn Rovers host Coventry City

arts.ttl: Coventry City predicted XI as stick or tweak decision to be made against Blackburn Rovers - Andy Turner
arts.sum: Predicted City team: Oliver Dovin; Joel Latibeaudiere, Luis Binks, Liam Kitching; Milan van Ewijk, Jamie Allen, Victor Torp, Jake Bidwell; Jack Rudoni; Ellis Simms, Brandon Thomas-Asante. The same could be said in midfield where Jamie Allen and Victor Torp operated impressively while Josh Eccles then entered the field in the second half, on this occasion to give Jack Rudoni a rest for the remaining 18 minutes of the game.

arts.ttl: Coventry City 'interested' in versatile Premier League man who ticks several boxes
arts.sum: The 32-year-old has already been linked with interest from this week’s Sky Blues opponents Blackburn Rovers along with Millwall and Preston North End. Schlupp is also reported to be liked by Major League Soccer (MLS) clubs as well, including San Diego FC and Charlotte FC. The player ticks a lot of boxes for the Sky Blues in terms of positions, with the left-sided operator having played at left-back, left-wing and as a central midfield whilst at Palace.

arts.ttl: Coventry City transfer news as Fulham 'considering swoop' in January window
arts.sum: The 24-year-old full-back has already been the subject of transfer speculation in the current window after Dutch outlet soccernews.nl claimed Turkish club Galatasaray were in talks with the Sky Blues about the player, while the former Netherlands Under-21 international was also linked with interest from Feyenoord and PSV in the summer. Fulham boss Marco Silva is “considering” making a move for Coventry City right-back Milan van Ewijk this month amid uncertain futures for two of his current defenders, it has been claimed.
